steps.description: Wait for page and OneTrust cookie banner
Wait for cookie banner to close
Navigate to orders page (establishes session for API calls)
Wait for orders page to render and API session
Extract orders via P&C REST API (fetch customer-data-2 for userId, then order detail API for each order)

jsExtractConfig.extractScript: async function extractOrders(targetOrderIds){var statusMap={'submitted':'processing','confirmed':'processing','in_delivery':'shipped','shipped':'shipped','delivered':'delivered','cancelled':'cancelled','returned':'returned','partially_returned':'returned','completed':'delivered'}; var carrierMap={'DHL_STANDARD':'DHL','DHL_EXPRESS':'DHL Express','DPD':'DPD','HERMES':'Hermes','GLS':'GLS','UPS':'UPS'}; var results=[]; try{var custResp=await fetch('/api/discover/customer-data-2'); if(!custResp.ok) throw new Error('customer-data-2 HTTP '+custResp.status); var custJson=await custResp.json(); var userId=custJson.data&&custJson.data.webShopAccountId; if(!userId) throw new Error('No userId in customer-data-2');  for(var i=0;i<targetOrderIds.length;i++){var orderId=targetOrderIds[i]; try{var apiUrl='/api/fulfill/tenants/PUC_DE/users/'+userId+'/orders/'+orderId+'?returnReservationsEnabled=true'; var resp=await fetch(apiUrl); if(!resp.ok){results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:'API HTTP '+resp.status}); continue;} var json=await resp.json(); var order=json.data&&json.data.order; var orderState=json.data&&json.data.orderState; if(!order){results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:'No order in response'}); continue;} var rawStatus=orderState||order.status||null; var status=rawStatus?statusMap[rawStatus.toLowerCase()]||rawStatus:null; var tracking=null; var carrier=null; var deliveryDate=null; if(order.shipmentCarrier){carrier=carrierMap[order.shipmentCarrier]||order.shipmentCarrier;} if(order.shippingData&&order.shippingData.length>0){var sd=order.shippingData[0]; tracking=sd.trackingId||null; if(sd.deliveryDate){deliveryDate=sd.deliveryDate.substring(0,10);} if(sd.arrivalDate){deliveryDate=sd.arrivalDate.substring(0,10);}} results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:status,rawStatus:rawStatus,trackingNumber:tracking,courier:carrier,estimatedDeliveryDate:deliveryDate,success:true});}catch(e){results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:e.message});}}}catch(e){for(var j=0;j<targetOrderIds.length;j++){results.push({shopOrderId:targetOrderIds[j],status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:'Init error: '+e.message});}} return results;} return extractOrders(targetOrderIds);
